lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: BABY!!!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: BABY!!! YOU DID IT!!!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: You saved me!!!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Hehehe. Of course! I am a strong independent woman.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Oh yes you are! Muah muah muah!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Oh... and about earlier...

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: I'm really sorry about eating the shrimp tail.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: I know you love shrimp tails, and I should have remembered to give them to you.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: You must have felt so sad and hungry, I'm sorry for invalidating how you felt.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: I did feel sad and invalidated at the moment. Thank you for acknowledging how I felt.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: But it's not entirely your fault. I'm sorry too.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: I know you didn't mean to neglect me like that.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: You were just eating and enjoying the moment with me. It must have not crossed your mind to leave the shrimp tails because you were so engrossed in the moment.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: I know that in other circumstances, you would have definitely given me the shrimp tail.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: I'm sorry I lashed out at you.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: It's okay. I forgive you.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Next time, I will make sure to cut off the shrimp tails first, and give them over to you before I eat so I don't ever forget again.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Aww. I would love that. Thank you baby!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: I love you baby! Thank you for always being open, understanding, and caring.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Thank you also for making me feel heard and loved. I love you too!
